atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for injecting base, component, utility, or screen styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for composing existing utility classes into custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for assigning custom styles to base, components, or utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for specifying a Tailwind configuration file.
